nasb.text: They said, “If we have found favor in your sight, let this land be given to your servants as a possession; do not take us across the Jordan.”

esv.text: And they said, “If we have found favor in your sight, let this land be given to your servants for a possession. Do not take us across the Jordan.”

cnv.text: 他們又說：“如果我們在你眼前蒙恩，求你把這地給你的僕人作產業，不要叫我們過約旦河。”

ccb.text: 如果你们恩待我们，请将这些地方赐给我们作产业，别让我们过约旦河了。”
